sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-06-01 10:12
- Distance: 12.6 km
- Moving time: 1:08:36
- Elapsed time: 1:08:36
- Elevation gain: 56.8 m
- Average heart rate: 165.8 bpm
- Max heart rate: 180 bpm
- Average watts: 209.7 W
- Average speed: 11 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `167.3 bpm`, ranging from `152.2` to `174.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `162.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `173.9 bpm` (+11.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.5 spm`, with a working range of `120.0` to `180.0 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `171.5 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `172.2 spm` (+0.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:27 /km` across `12.595 km` in `1:08:36` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:33 /km` and second-half pace was `5:21 /km` (-12 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `165.8 bpm` average and `180 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `159.8 bpm` in the first half and `172.2 bpm` in the second (+12.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:08:36` out of `1:08:36` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `0.5%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `91.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.6 m` and `14.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `52.2 m` in the first half and `39.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
